title: Zenica, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zenica, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zenica is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 110,000. An industrial city in central Bosnia on the Bosna River, known for its steel mill and the nearby medieval town of Vranduk.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
